case_title: MOON HING LAU VS. CHRISTOPHER CHONG WONG et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. AMY WONG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY LAU, MOON HING AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, CHRISTOPHER CHONG LI, YAN TAO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2011 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, MOON HING AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YAN TAO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, MOON HING IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WONG, CHRISTOPHER CHONG LI, YAN TAO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
